pattern: 0-1 BFS or Dijkstra on state (box_pos, player_pos): pushing the box costs 1, player repositioning around the box costs 0 (via BFS check).
hints: State is (box_row, box_col, player_row, player_col). A push moves the box one step and requires the player to be adjacent on the opposite side.
Use a priority queue: pushing the box costs 1; for each push direction check if the player can reach the required position (BFS with the box as an extra obstacle).
Return the minimum pushes to reach state where box is at T, or -1 if no such state is reachable.

edge_inputs.description: player must go around to push box to target

stress.description: Fully open small bordered grid with random S, B, T placements
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = size
    inner = [(i, j) for i in range(1, n-1) for j in range(1, n-1)]
    rng.shuffle(inner)
    sr, sc = inner[0]
    br, bc = inner[1]
    tr, tc = inner[2]
    grid = [['#' if (i==0 or i==n-1 or j==0 or j==n-1) else '.' for j in range(n)] for i in range(n)]
    grid[sr][sc] = 'S'
    grid[br][bc] = 'B'
    grid[tr][tc] = 'T'
    return [grid]
